title: NBC News - Breaking Headlines and Video Reports on World, U.S. and Local Angles | NBC News
meta_description: Go to NBCNews.com for breaking news, videos, and the latest top stories in world news, business, politics, health and pop culture.
text_content: NBC News - Breaking Headlines and Video Reports on World, U.S. and Local Angles | NBC News IE 11 is not supported. For an optimal experience visit our site on another browser. Skip to Content Advertisement Nuclear sites targeted across the Middle East Nuclear sites targeted across the Middle East Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iran's power plants if Strait of Hormuz isn't opened The president said Iran has 48 hours. Meanwhile, Iran's main nuclear enrichment site was struck again. Iran fires missiles at U.K.-U.S. base, claiming long-range capabilities The Iran war has already hit your gas budget. Here's what it's coming for next. Will Waldron / Albany Times Union via Getty Images Underground Railroad museum sues Trump administration alleging it canceled grant on basis of race The lawsuit, which calls for the funds to be reinstated, says the cancellation amounted to racial discrimination. World Cuba's power grid collapses, leaving it without electricity for the 3rd time this month The country's aging grid has eroded in recent years, but the government has also blamed the outages on a U.S. energy blockade. Mengshin Lin / AP Evacuation orders lifted in Oahu but storm threat remains Flash floods are possible from Oahu to the Big Island through Sunday afternoon, the National Weather Service said. Culture and trends Kim Min - Hee / Pool / Getty Images BTS reunites after military hiatus with historic Seoul comeback performance The K-pop supergroup returned to the stage for the first time in nearly four years ahead of a global tour.
